display.purpose: Hero headlines and campaign-scale headings. Moderate weight, tight tracking. Never bolded to 700+ at display size.

headline.purpose: Section headings, page titles, collection names.

title.purpose: Product names in cards, sub-section headers, sidebar labels.

body.purpose: Long-form paragraphs, product descriptions, blog copy. Max 65-75ch line length.

label.purpose: Badges, category chips, certification marks, trust-bar items. All-caps, tracked. Labels only — never headings or paragraphs.

motion.name: ease-color
motion.purpose: Color-only transitions on buttons and links. Fast, unobtrusive.

motion.name: ease-border
motion.purpose: Border-color transitions on product cards and interactive containers.

components.name: Button Primary
components.description: Main CTA button. Used for Wholesale Apply, Add to Cart, and primary form submissions.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; background: #6b7c5a; color: #f5f0e8; padding: 8px 20px; font-size: 14px; font-family: Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 500; border-radius: 4px; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #5a6b4a; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #f5f0e8, 0 0 0 4px #6b7c5a; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Button Secondary
components.description: Outlined action button. Used for secondary CTAs like Download Catalogue or View Details.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; background: transparent; color: #6b7c5a; border: 1px solid #6b7c5a; padding: 8px 20px; font-size: 14px; font-family: Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 500; border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms ease; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: #ede8de; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #f5f0e8, 0 0 0 4px #6b7c5a; } .ds-btn-secondary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Button Ghost
components.description: Minimal action button. Used for low-priority actions like View All or Dismiss.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; background: transparent; color: #7a7868; border: none; padding: 8px 20px; font-size: 14px; font-family: Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 500; border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms ease; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: #ede8de; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #f5f0e8, 0 0 0 4px #6b7c5a; } .ds-btn-ghost:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Badge Sale
components.description: Overlaid top-left on product card images to signal a discounted product.
components.css: .ds-badge-sale { display: inline-block; background: #d8e2d0; color: #5a6b4a; padding: 2px 6px; font-size: 0.65rem; font-family: Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.05em; text-transform: uppercase; border-radius: 4px; }

components.name: Badge Out of Stock
components.description: Overlaid top-left on product card images to signal an unavailable product.
components.css: .ds-badge-oos { display: inline-block; background: #e8ddd5; color: #8b4a42; padding: 2px 6px; font-size: 0.65rem; font-family: Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.05em; text-transform: uppercase; border-radius: 4px; }

components.name: Badge New
components.description: Overlaid top-left on product card images to signal a recently added product.
components.css: .ds-badge-new { display: inline-block; background: #d4c9b0; color: #7a7868; padding: 2px 6px; font-size: 0.65rem; font-family: Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.05em; text-transform: uppercase; border-radius: 4px; }

components.name: Product Card
components.description: Core browsing unit on collection pages. Image-first, title, price. No excerpt, no hover-reveal panels.
components.html:
Organic Sencha Green Tea

AUD 24.00
components.css: .ds-product-card { display: block; background: #ede8de; border: 1px solid #d4c9b0; border-radius: 4px; overflow: hidden; text-decoration: none; transition: border-color 150ms ease; } .ds-product-card:hover { border-color: #6b7c5a; } .ds-product-card:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #f5f0e8, 0 0 0 4px #6b7c5a; } .ds-product-card__image { background: #d4c9b0; aspect-ratio: 1; width: 100%; } .ds-product-card__body { padding: 12px; } .ds-product-card__title { font-size: 14px; font-family: Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 500; color: #3d3d35; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; margin: 0; } .ds-product-card:hover .ds-product-card__title { text-decoration: underline; } .ds-product-card__price { display: block; font-size: 14px; font-family: Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; color: #3d3d35; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; margin-top: 4px; }

components.name: Navigation Header
components.description: Top-of-page navigation. Brand mark + Shop, Wholesale (B2B priority), Cart links.
components.html:
Teavision
  • Shop
  • Wholesale
  • Cart
components.css: .ds-header { background: #f5f0e8; border-bottom: 1px solid #d4c9b0; padding: 12px 16px; } .ds-header__nav { max-width: 1280px; margin: 0 auto; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; } .ds-header__brand { font-size: 16px; font-family: Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; color: #3d3d35; text-decoration: none; } .ds-header__brand:hover { text-decoration: underline; } .ds-header__links { display: flex; gap: 24px; list-style: none; margin: 0; padding: 0; } .ds-header__link { font-size: 14px; font-family: Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 400; color: #3d3d35; text-decoration: none; } .ds-header__link:hover { text-decoration: underline; } .ds-header__link--wholesale { color: #6b7c5a; font-weight: 500; } .ds-header__link:focus-visible, .ds-header__brand:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #f5f0e8, 0 0 0 4px #6b7c5a; border-radius: 2px; }

narrative.overview:
The Teavision design system is a merchant's catalog that respects its reader. The aesthetic is built from the raw material up: sand and sage aren't decorative choices — they're what tea looks like before it's brewed. The palette reads like dried herbs laid on aged paper, the type is clear and authoritative without ceremony. Nothing is here for show. Every element either carries information or stays out of the way.

This is a B2B supplier that has served St. Ali, Remedy Drinks, and 1,000+ businesses. The design earns confidence through specificity: real certification marks, named origins, actual testimonials from actual businesses. No lifestyle photography abstractions, no wellness-brand softness. The warmth comes from the materials themselves, not applied as a veneer.

The system refuses four aesthetic families: the artisan craft-tea hipster register (kraft paper, hand-stamped texture, overworked provenance theater), clinical wellness white (mint green accents, molecule graphics, pharmaceutical sterility), mass-market grocery commodity energy (primary-color banners, coupon typography, supermarket shelf logic), and the generic B2B SaaS template (pricing grids, feature checkmarks, star-rating carousels with headshots). What remains is a serious supplier's interface: grounded, warm, and precise.
keyCharacteristics: A tonal stack of dried-botanical neutrals: sand, linen, straw, sage — no cold grays anywhere
Single Geist typeface throughout; hierarchy through weight and scale, not font switching
Flat surfaces with depth from tonal layering, no decorative shadows
One primary accent (Dried Sage green) used sparingly: CTAs, active states, sale signals
Touch-target-aware interactive elements; WCAG AA with visible sage focus rings throughout

rules.name: The Dried Botanical Rule
rules.body: Every neutral in this system has a warm tint toward ochre or sage (H 80-140). There are no cool grays. If a neutral reads as charcoal, slate, or cool gray, it's wrong — rework with chroma raised toward the yellow-green family.

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Dried Sage (#6b7c5a) appears on 15% or less of any given surface. Its job is to mean 'action.' If it's everywhere, it means nothing. Decorative sage touches are prohibited.

rules.name: The Single Voice Rule
rules.body: One font family at all sizes. Don't add a serif display font for 'warmth' or a mono font for 'technical credibility.' Geist carries every role. Atmosphere comes from the palette, not font switching.

rules.name: The Weight Ladder Rule
rules.body: Use weight steps of at least 100 between adjacent hierarchy levels (400 body to 500 title to 600 headline). Avoid the flat-scale trap of all-medium-weight text at slightly different sizes.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. A shadow on a card is not atmospheric polish; it's visual noise that breaks the material language. Use tonal layering and border-color changes for depth and state.

dos: Do use the tonal stack for depth: Sun-Dried Parchment (base) to Aged Linen (card) to Warm Bisque or Pale Herb (raised). Never introduce a cool neutral.
Do lead with specifics: certification names (HACCP, ACO Organic), real origin countries, named clients (St. Ali, Remedy Drinks, MOOD Tea).
Do treat the Wholesale CTA as a primary action on every relevant surface — equal to or more prominent than Add to Cart.
Do use tabular-nums on all price displays for column alignment.
Do ensure all keyboard-focusable elements have visible sage focus rings (box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #f5f0e8, 0 0 0 4px #6b7c5a).
Do cap body copy at 65-75ch line length.
Do reserve the uppercase/tracked label style for badges, certification marks, and category chips only.
donts: Don't use artisan craft-tea aesthetics: hand-stamped texture overlays, kraft paper backgrounds, overworked provenance theater.
Don't use clinical wellness white: white backgrounds with mint or sage accents, pharmaceutical-sterile layouts.
Don't use mass-market grocery commodity energy: primary-color banners, coupon-style typography, sale badges that mimic supermarket shelf tags.
Don't apply generic B2B SaaS templates: pricing tables with feature-grid checkmarks, testimonial carousels with headshots and star ratings, hero metric blocks.
Don't introduce a second typeface for atmosphere. Geist handles all roles.
Don't add box-shadow to cards, list items, or content containers. The system is flat.
Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe. Use a background tint from the tonal stack instead.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text with a gradient fill). Use Dried Sage (#6b7c5a) solid.
Don't remove the footer's keyword links for visual cleanliness. They are SEO traffic infrastructure and a hard requirement.
